summarySentence: For Agriculture, the best-performing model at the 12-month horizon was RandomForest (No Price) with RMSE = 10.29 and MAE = 8.56.
For Clothing and Footwear, the best-performing model at the 12-month horizon was SARIMA (Not Applicable) with RMSE = 8.02 and MAE = 7.10.
For Furniture and Fixtures, the best-performing model at the 12-month horizon was Naive (Not Applicable) with RMSE = 6.25 and MAE = 5.15.
For Agriculture, the best-performing model at the 3-month horizon was SARIMA (Not Applicable) with RMSE = 9.44 and MAE = 7.62.
For Clothing and Footwear, the best-performing model at the 3-month horizon was Naive (Not Applicable) with RMSE = 10.16 and MAE = 7.58.
For Furniture and Fixtures, the best-performing model at the 3-month horizon was LinearRegression (With Price) with RMSE = 4.48 and MAE = 3.84.
